properties.commit-auth-owner: If `commit` is successfully called, then the sender must be the owner.
properties.reveal-auth-owner: If `reveal` is successfully called, then the sender must be the owner.
properties.reveal-timeout-after-commit: `reveal` and `timeout` can only be called after `commit`.
properties.sent-le-init-bal: The overall sent amount does not exceed the initial deposit.
properties.timeout-deadline: If `timeout` is called, then at least 1000 blocks have passed since the contract was deployed.
properties.cant-uncommit: Once `isCommitted` is set to true, no call to function can unset it
properties.commit-minimum: If `commit` is called successfully, then msg.value should be at least `fee`
properties.commit-twice-reverts: Calling `commit` after a successful call should revert
properties.reveal-preimage: If `reveal` does not revert, then the revealed string is a preimage of the committed hash
properties.timeout-transfer: When `timeout` is successfully called, then all the balance should be transferred to the verifier
